blindspots: **ScotPac facility full covenant terms** — `[DATA GAP]`. Management-stated "zero financial covenants" on primary AUD 400M stack, but full loan-document terms (change-of-control, MAC clauses, cross-defaults) not publicly disclosed. A hidden trigger would be the FP-7 covenant-fragility leg rearming.

**Chemist Warehouse consolidation trajectory** — `[DATA GAP — partial]`. CW buying / consolidating independent pharmacies is ongoing; the PACE of consolidation determines the rate of channel-customer-credit stress for PGC. No single public tracker.

**Full ANZ healthcare distributor peer set beyond EBOS** — `[DATA GAP]`. EBOS is the only clean public peer; API was taken private (2022); Sigma merged into CW (2024). FP-1 Unverified-Core-Inputs partial flag. Weak peer set = wider multiple-confidence band.
**FY26 FY results date** — `[DATA GAP]`. Estimated ~26-28 Aug 2026 by analogy to FY24/25 cadence. Not yet pre-announced per 2026-04-20 news-scan Jan→Apr 2026 catalogue. Monitor ASX investor calendar.

**Infinity 101-pharmacy / 87-entity rollup residual cohort health** — `[DATA GAP]`. Fully provided for as a group, but specific residual cohort commercial status (how many still trading, which are recovering) not disclosed. Recovery above the provision would be a positive surprise; further deterioration would be incremental.
**Wilson Asset Management 7.45% intent** — `[DATA GAP — new institutional endorsement surfaced 22 Sep 2025]`. Hold horizon + accumulation vs distribution intent unclear.

noiseFilter: **2-analyst coverage swings** — Only Morgans + Bell Potter cover PGC (thin). Analyst PT moves = Rule 17 market-state context only, NEVER FV anchor. Consensus-PT swings of ±30% on single-analyst revision = noise.

**Statutory-vs-underlying EBITDA optics** — Infinity AUD 46.4M provision already provided. Statutory interest coverage 0.5x optic is KNOWN to be depressed by the one-off. Only a SECOND customer write-off (#1) reactivates the thesis concern.

**<A$500k daily volume moves** — PGC is thinly traded (tiny float after CH2 reverse merger). Intra-day 5-10% moves on <A$500k volume = retail noise. Only volume >A$2M or sustained 5-day institutional flow = signal.

**Individual pharmacy insolvencies below Infinity scale** — Single-pharmacy insolvencies (<AUD 5M exposure) are recurring ambient-noise in the Australian channel. Only aggregated filings across 90 days (#12) or a single filing >AUD 20M (#1) are structural.

**EMULAB FY24 write-down / Hooper era residuals** — Legacy pre-CH2-merger items. Already surfaced in bulk-transcript-review (FY24 Collins call). Any further EMULAB-era commentary is noise; only NEW post-CH2 provisions count.

**Collins EXEC-DIR-M&A transition** — Was surfaced as a potential "departure signal" but bulk-transcript-review confirmed this is M&A specialization, not a step-down. Any further commentary on Collins role is organizational noise.
